title: acaciella angustissima
intro: Acaciella angustissima, also known as the narrow-leafed acacia or the Mexican palo fierro, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Acaciella angustissima include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues, as well as promoting wound healing and improving respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Acaciella angustissima can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
